title: ON THE NORMALISERS OF ALL NON- p -NILPOTENT SUBGROUPS IN A FINITE GROUP
author_string: LI, XUAN, WANG, JUNXIN, GUO, XIUYUN
journal: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract:
Abstract
                  
                    For a prime
                    p
                    , let
                    
                      
                        
                        $\mathcal {N}_p(G)$
                      
                    
                    denote the intersection of the normalisers of all non-
                    p
                    -nilpotent subgroups of a finite group
                    G
                    and set
                    
                      
                        
                        $\mathcal {N}_p(G)=G$
                      
                    
                    if
                    G
                    itself is
                    p
                    -nilpotent. We give some properties of
                    
                      
                        
                        $\mathcal {N}_p(G)$
                      
                    
                    and investigate the influence of
                    
                      
                        
                        $\mathcal {N}_p(G)$
                      
                    
                    on
                    G
                    .
